name: Search AI Strategies
description: Three standalone search strategy agents demonstrating aggregation, knowledge retrieval, and list query patterns using SearchAI vocabulary resolution and search tools.

aggregation-agent.description: Handles analytical/aggregation queries by resolving measure and dimension terms via vocabulary

knowledge-retrieval-agent.description: Handles semantic/multi-hop knowledge retrieval using vector search with vocabulary-based filtering

list-query-agent.description: Handles structured list/filter queries by resolving business terms and executing structured search

search-tools.description: Vocabulary resolution, aggregation, hybrid search, vector search, and structured query tools
